scripts.kill:5173: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; exit 0"
scripts.dev:local: npm run kill:5173 && npm run dev -- --host --strictPort --port 5173
